reach_why: Extends known debates on search, truth-tracking, and explanation quality, but does not open wholly new territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links truth-tracking, hard-to-vary explanations, early conjectures, and opaque truths in LLM evaluation.
falsifiable_why: Test by comparing systems with truth-linked feedback versus judge-pleasing heuristics and early-rigidity constraints.
explanation: Narrowing search succeeds only when tied to reality while preserving strange truths and immature conjectures.
